race.comment: Weak race and giving KING ALLA (2) another chance. Was going well before last start when pushed forward from a tricky gate and tried to lead throughout but weakened late. Well placed this line-up and drawn better. Well worth another chance. TARSHIN (9) was runner-up in a highway two back then thereabouts last time. Best form stacks up and drawn for a soft run. Gets chance to find some form. REAL INTRIGUE (3) wasn't  far from the winner last time and can feature on best. ZIGGY STARCRAFT (5) is editing back into form, the latest finishing runner-up. Placed only try at the trip and shapes as a key runner. OVERLOADED (13) is back in great shape with a mile win in easier company and fitter can play a role in the finish.
